headline: GTA Online
subtitle: Lunar New Year Gifts
content:
This week is your last chance to claim your Lunar New Years gifts in GTA Online.

Flood your engine with nitrous in Lunar New Year Stunt Races, celebrate the Chinese Zodiac with the Red Year of the Horse Tee, Horse Masks and Horse Tattoos, then locate 36 Yuanbao Collectibles to ensure this year is one of health, wealth, and auspicious fortune.
